categories.name: Champion Titles
categories.description: Epithets and titles found on the loading screen.

pool.clue: Known as 'The Frost Archer,' this Freljordian queen was one of the original champions.
'The Sinister Blade' refers to this Noxian assassin, daughter of General Du Couteau.
This Yordle carries the title 'The Hammer,' though she was formerly known as the 'Iron Ambassador.'
'The Pride of Nazumah' is the title of this tank/skirmisher hailing from Shurima.
Formerly the 'Master Tactician,' this Noxian ruler is now known simply as 'The Grand General.'

categories.name: Ability Names
categories.description: The canonical names of Q, W, E, and R abilities.

pool.clue: 'Rocket Grab' is the signature Q ability of this steam golem.
This champion's ultimate, 'Trueshot Barrage,' fires a global energy wave.
'Alpha Strike' is the Q ability that allows this Wuju bladesman to become untargetable.
The passive ability that heals this vastaya after landing abilities is named 'Essence... what?'
Upon gathering enough Stardust, Aurelion Sol's ultimate upgrades from 'Falling Star' to this apocalyptic name.
This sniper's passive, 'Headshot,' grants bonus damage every few auto-attacks.
'League of Draven' generates these stacks upon catching axes.
'Granite Shield' provides this rock-solid champion with a shield equal to 10% of his max health.
'Damnation' allows this support to collect souls to permanently increase Armor and AP.
'Signature of the Visionary' is the passive of this artistic mid laner, marking enemies damaged by his abilities.

categories.name: Ultimate Authority
categories.description: Identify the champion based on the description of their R.

pool.clue: Applies 'Nearsight' to all enemy champions on the map, reducing their vision radius, before allowing the user to dash to a target.
Freezes a target champion to stun them; if self-cast, the user becomes invulnerable and heals while slowing nearby enemies.
Charges toward a location, gaining a massive shield and leaving behind a wind trail that grants movement speed to following allies.
Creates a magnetic field that drags nearby enemies toward the user and stuns them; unlike Amumu or Diana, the user can move while dragging enemies.
Channels a whirlpool that pulls enemies in and deals damage; distinctively, it heals the user and nearby allies for a portion of the damage dealt.

categories.name: Champion Quotes
categories.description: Audio cues heard during the Pick & Ban phase.

pool.clue: 'Tonight, we hunt!'
'Ok.'
'The cycle of life and death continues. We will live, they will die.'
'Fighting is in my blood... I mean, my goo.'
'Imagine if I had a real weapon.'
This K-Pop inspired skin line features Ahri, Akali, Evelynn, and Kai'Sa.
Lux, Jinx, and Ezreal are prominent members of this 'Magical Girl' anime-inspired skin line.
This skin line reimagines the Wild West with demons and angels, featuring Lucian, Thresh, and Urgot.
This cyberpunk skin line features champions like Ashe, Ekko, and Mordekaiser with cybernetic enhancements.
Inspired by the Ionian afterlife festival, this skin line features dating-sim elements and champions like Yone and Cassiopeia.
Released in Feb 2009, this 'Dark Child' was among the very first champions in the Alpha.
Released in 2013, this champion was the first to have a music video ('Get Jinxed').
Released in 2019, this Solari marksman requires a custom HUD to manage his 5 weapons.
This Piltover Enforcer was the last champion released in 2012.
This 'Defender of Tomorrow' was the 100th champion released.

categories.name: Weapon of Choice

categories.name: Reset Mechanics
categories.description: Champions who get cooldown refunds on kills.

pool.clue: Her 'Rocket Jump' resets on kills, assists, or fully stacking explosive charge.
His ultimate 'Noxian Guillotine' refreshes its cooldown if it kills the target.
His ultimate 'Death from Below' resets if it executes an enemy, granting gold.
His ultimate 'Highlander' passively reduces the remaining cooldowns of his basic abilities by 70% on a takedown.
Her passive reduces all ability cooldowns by 15 seconds upon scoring a takedown.

categories.name: Worlds MVPs
categories.description: Most Valuable Players from the last 5 years.

pool.clue: The 2024 Finals MVP, solidifying his legacy as the Unkillable Demon King with his 5th title.

The 2020 Finals MVP, a jungler for DAMWON Gaming who revolutionized the carry jungle meta.
The 2021 Finals MVP, mid laner for EDG who defeated ShowMaker in the finals.
